ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country the city is located in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on quality of life metrics */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sunshine_hours" (
  "sunshine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for sunshine hour records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "sunshine_hours" INTEGER /* Annual sunshine hours for the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the sunshine hours are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the sunshine hours are recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sunshine hours data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sunshine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sunshine_hours_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cost records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "water_cost" REAL /* Cost of a bottle of water in the city */,
  "gym_cost" REAL /* Cost of a monthly gym membership in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the cost of living is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the cost of living is recorded */,
  "rent_cost" REAL /* Average cost of rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city center */,
  "grocery_cost" REAL /* Average cost of a basket of groceries */,
  "public_transport_cost" REAL /* Average cost of a monthly public transport pass */,
  "internet_cost" REAL /* Average cost of a 100 Mbps internet connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for health metrics */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country associated with the city */,
  "obesity_level" REAL /* Obesity levels in the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in years in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the health metrics are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the health metrics are recorded */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that smokes */,
  "obesity_rate_children" REAL /* Obesity rate among children in the country */,
  "mental_health_index" REAL /* Measure of mental health in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_country_name FOREIGN KEY ("country_name") REFERENCES cities ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_indices" (
  "pollution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for pollution records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "pollution_index" REAL /* Pollution index score for the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the pollution indices are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the pollution indices are recorded */,
  "aqi" REAL /* Air Quality Index (AQI) for the city */,
  "pm25" REAL /* Concentration of PM2.5 particles in the air */,
  "noise_pollution" REAL /* Average noise pollution level in decibels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for work hours records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "avg_hours_worked" INTEGER /* Annual average hours worked in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the work hours are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the work hours are recorded */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Average number of overtime hours worked annually */,
  "paid_leave_days" INTEGER /* Average number of paid leave days per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_levels" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for happiness records */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country associated with the city */,
  "happiness_index" REAL /* Happiness levels in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the happiness levels are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the happiness levels are recorded */,
  "satisfaction_with_life" REAL /* Average satisfaction with life on a scale of 1 to 10 */,
  "trust_in_government" REAL /* Average trust in government on a scale of 1 to 10 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_levels_country_name FOREIGN KEY ("country_name") REFERENCES cities ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "outdoor_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for outdoor activities records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "activities_count" INTEGER /* Number of outdoor activities available in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the outdoor activities data is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the outdoor activities data is recorded */,
  "popular_activity" TEXT /* Most popular outdoor activity in the city */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of outdoor activities (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outdoor_activities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "takeout_places" (
  "takeout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for takeout records */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "takeout_count" INTEGER /* Number of takeout places in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the takeout places data is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the takeout places data is recorded */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of takeout places in the city */,
  "delivery_services" INTEGER /* Number of delivery services available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("takeout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_takeout_places_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for city information */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "sunshine_hours_id" INTEGER /* Linked sunshine hours record ID */,
  "cost_of_living_id" INTEGER /* Linked cost of living record ID */,
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Linked health metrics record ID */,
  "pollution_id" INTEGER /* Linked pollution index record ID */,
  "work_hours_id" INTEGER /* Linked work hours record ID */,
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Linked happiness levels record ID */,
  "activities_id" INTEGER /* Linked outdoor activities record ID */,
  "takeout_id" INTEGER /* Linked takeout places record ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the comprehensive city information is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the comprehensive city information is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the comprehensive city information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_work_hours_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_hours_id") REFERENCES work_hours ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_takeout_id FOREIGN KEY ("takeout_id") REFERENCES takeout_places ("takeout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_sunshine_hours_id FOREIGN KEY ("sunshine_hours_id") REFERENCES sunshine_hours ("sunshine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_cost_of_living_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_of_living_id") REFERENCES cost_of_living ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_pollution_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollution_id") REFERENCES pollution_indices ("pollution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_happiness_id FOREIGN KEY ("happiness_id") REFERENCES happiness_levels ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_health_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_info_activities_id FOREIGN KEY ("activities_id") REFERENCES outdoor_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, urban planner) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the user is from */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the city data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the city data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
